C:\Qt\Tools\CMake_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\SmartFileOptimizer.dir/objects.a
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\SmartFileOptimizer.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\SmartFileOptimizer.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\SmartFileOptimizer.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o SmartFileOptimizer.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libSmartFileOptimizer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\SmartFileOptimizer.dir\linkLibs.rsp
